title: Normalize Lua optimizer iterations for CLI summary
description:
Fix `plexus procedure optimize` post-success summary crash when procedure results contain Lua-style 1-indexed iteration tables.

Behavior:
- Convert contiguous 1-based numeric-key tables to Python lists during CLI result normalization.
- Preserve normal dict behavior for string-keyed and non-contiguous numeric-key mappings.
- Keep optimizer procedure YAML unchanged.
- Add regression coverage for conversion and default table summary rendering.

No commit/push/PR/CI until user reviews and approves.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented local working-tree fix for optimizer CLI result normalization. Extracted the Lua result converter into a module-level helper, made contiguous 1-based integer-key tables become Python lists, and added regression coverage for conversion plus default table summary rendering. Verification: pytest plexus/cli/procedure/test_feedback_alignment_optimizer_config.py plexus/cli/procedure/test_procedure_optimize_cli_result.py -q (40 passed). Not closing because the change is not committed/landed pending user review.
